name_cn:
【M47106】Backup Cream White Backpack
Top-tier
This Backup Ys backpack is crafted from Monogram Empreinte calfskin leather, subtly featuring Monogram embossing. The detachable and adjustable shoulder strap allows for both single-shoulder and backpack carrying, while the top handle and braided chain offer tote or crossbody options.
Size: 20 x 22 x 14 cm (Length x Height x Width)
